codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original achievement-panel implementation and the later fix commit that addressed its two prior blockers. The feature now satisfies the requested panel UI, unlock toast, reward/idempotency behavior, and real-time level-achievement tracking path without the prior wheel-listener leak.

summary: Reviewed the worker handoff, transcript skeleton, ui-worker skill, original feature diff (7373165), and fix diff (f83b1f2). The original review's two blockers are adequately addressed: level achievements are now checked from the dedicated level-up handler for all sources, and the achievement panel wheel handler is cleaned up on destroy following the documented UIScene pattern. Report written to the requested review path.
